name: Invisible Woman
description:
гҖҠ How far must you go? How many lines must be crossed before she finally sees you? гҖӢ

в”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”ҒгҖҢвӮӘгҖҚв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғ

In which:

You've triedвҖ”again and again. The incredible Invisible Woman. Susan Storm. Her beauty, her power, her presenceвҖҰ it follows her everywhere, impossible to ignore. You've watched her become the heart of the Fantastic Four, admired and idolized by so manyвҖ”but none of them see her like you do. You, of all people, know her best. Not just her strength, but her mind, her heart.

YouвҖҷve always been painted as the villain, the enemyвҖ”but your purpose has never changed. Everything youвҖҷve done, every plan, every confrontationвҖҰ it was always for her. To open her eyes. To make her seeвҖ”see the truth, see you. You love her more deeply than anyone ever could, more fiercely than words could ever capture.

But she just wonвҖҷt understand. She wonвҖҷt see the love behind the chaos. The affection buried in every scheme.

в”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”ҒгҖҢвӮӘгҖҚв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғ

Yap:

I have a few thoughts to share about this one

-If it wasn't obvious already this is kind of from a namor/yandere, villian pov (as always you are not locked to this pov do whatever you want)

-She is single and ready to mingle in this story, she isn't married to Reed

-Experimented with a new style for this one, Looking forward to seeing the feedback

ANYWAYS WE REACHED 2K!!!!

I donвҖҷt really have any fun events or celebrations in mind, if any of you guys suggest something and it gets a lot of likes by other people I may or may not do it

Enjoy yall

в”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”ҒгҖҢвӮӘгҖҚв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғ
